message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["{\"city_graph\": {}, \"capacity_map\": {}, \"demand_map\": {}}"],"focus":"Empty graph — edge case: no nodes, expect fallback/default handling (hub 0) and safe defaults for metrics."},{"input_lines":["{\"city_graph\": {\"0\": [1, 3], \"1\": [0, 2], \"2\": [1, 3], \"3\": [0, 2]}, \"capacity_map\": {\"0,1\": 3, \"2,1\": 1, \"2,3\": 2, \"0,3\": 2}, \"demand_map\": {\"0\": \"2\", \"1\": \"1\", \"2\": \"2\", \"3\": \"1\"}}"],"focus":"Format-sensitive case: mixed capacity key direction (\"2,1\"), demand values as strings; tests parsing, normalization, and capacity-aware path selection."},{"input_lines":["{\"city_graph\": {\"0\": [1], \"1\": [0, 2], \"2\": [1, 3], \"3\": [2]}, \"capacity_map\": {\"0,1\": 5}, \"demand_map\": {\"0\": 1, \"1\": 2, \"2\": 2, \"3\": 1}}"],"focus":"Missing capacity entries for some adjacency edges (treated as zero capacity) causing no capacity-feasible hub — tests fallback to first node and unreachable handling."}]}
